commands.command:
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y \
    python3 \
    python3-pip

commands.command:
FROM node:14 AS builder
WORKDIR /app
COPY . .
RUN npm install

FROM node:14
WORKDIR /app
COPY --from=builder /app .
